---
name: bmad-archive-artifacts
description: 'Archive or restore BMAD artifacts following the retention policy for _bmad-output and _bmad-archive. Default to archiving when the user does not explicitly specify restore. Use when the user says archive BMAD artifacts, restore BMAD artifacts, clean _bmad-output, move obsolete BMAD outputs, bring artifacts back from _bmad-archive, or apply the BMAD artifact archiving policy.'
---

Follow the instructions in ./workflow.md.
